category_sources: Official SourceForge homepage describes Mailcheck as a command-line tool for checking local and remote mailboxes for new messages.
source_facts.description: Check multiple mailboxes/maildirs for mail.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mailcheck; official SourceForge homepage title is mailcheck.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Mailcheck site and primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge and Debian pages provide release/source downloads but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it checks mailboxes/maildirs; official SourceForge homepage states support for mbox, maildir, POP3, and IMAP mailboxes.
